text: Useful online security tips and articles | F‑Secure Explore our tips and in-depth guides to avoid scams and threats. Romance scams: Stay safe from fraud and heart­break Romance scams cost victims millions each year and cause immeasurable emotional harm. Learn to spot fake dating profiles and emotional manipulation before it’s too late.
5 common gift card scams and how to avoid them Gift card scams are a common way to steal money. Learn about five common gift card scams and how to protect yourself and your money.
